title: Ubiquiti Wave-AP, UISP Wave Access Point
description: Wave Access Point is a 60GHz point-to-multipoint (PtMP) transmitter unit with built-in 5 GHz backup (WiFi 6 - 802.11ax) from Ubiquiti with a range of up to up to 8 km against the Wave LR or 5 km against the smaller Wave Nano unit and is ideal for ISPs. The very discreet device is also equipped with integrated GPS , Bluetooth for simple initial setup from a mobile via the UISP mobile application , a 2.5 Gigabit LAN port with PoE support and SFP+ port. The LAN port is functional only if the SFP+… Compact dimensions - 212 Ã 205 Ã 187 mm 60GHz spectrum with low interference - 57 to 71 GHz Range of up to 8 km - depends on the regulation in the country used , support of up to 15 clients Throughput 5.4 Gbps (2.7 Gbps FD) Supports half channel width to achieve longer distance or better availability in bad weather Supported channels: 58320, 59400, 60480, 61560, 62640, 63720, 64800, 65880, 66960, 68040, 69120, 70200 MHz - depends on place of use 2.5 Gigabit LAN port with passive PoE support (24 or 48V DC) + (1) SFP+ (1/10 Gbps) Built-in GPS Settings via web management and bluetooth - UISP mobile application Device Fine Tuning Holder PoE power adapter 48 V/0.65 A Power cord
